agents—and
improving
them
fast.”
Chad Holdorf
VP of Product, Demandbase
“We’re getting input [from Pendo] directly inside the product, right as users interact with [our] agents. We’re learning whether it’s helping them do their job, whether it’s actually moving pipeline. That kind of feedback is critical to building the right agents—and improving them fast.”
“We can be faster, we can be more nimble, we can be more innovative because we get the information faster [with Pendo].”
“To me, ‘Pendo’ing it’ means that I’m empowered to go in and make positive changes for our users on my own, without needing to involve the development team. Now we always say, ‘We’ll fix it with Pendo,’ because it allows us to create value for our users on our own as product people.”
“What used to be a lot of errors happening at once went to effectively zero.”

Try free today ->

What’s included:
Adoption and usage metrics to quantify AI agent impact.
Tracking to connect AI usage to retention and task completion.
Issue detection to automatically surface where agents fail.
Our pricing philosophy
Interested in customizing your plan?
Talk to Sales today
All-in access
When you buy a Pendo module, you get full functionality – no gated features, no forced upgrades. While other vendors fence capabilities by plan, you get complete access from day one to scale without limits.
Savings as you scale
As you upgrade plans or add usage, the incremental cost of adding more Pendo decreases. We build volume-based savings into our pricing, so you can plan growth with confidence.
Predictable by design
No bait and switch. We don’t hook you with a low starting price and surprise you later. Your pricing is clear upfront, and changes only when your usage or plan changes.
Find the right Pendo for you
✓ = included in bundle
$ = available for purchase as add-on

Pendo Pricing FAQ
+
−
How does Pendo pricing work?
Pendo pricing combines two things: the number of Monthly Active Users (MAUs) you track and the functionality you choose as part of your plan. As you add more MAUs, your overall price increases, but the cost per MAU goes down.
This model makes it simple to start small and expand as your needs grow. You only pay for the scale and functionality that create value for your business, and you can add more at any time. Our focus is helping you grow adoption and realize greater value from Pendo, so our priorities remain directly tied to the outcomes that matter most to you.
+
−
What is a Monthly Active User in Pendo?
Monthly active users (MAUs) are the number of unique visitors who were active in your app over the last 30 calendar days. In general, a unique visitor is counted as an active user if they engage with your app(s) at least once within a specified time period.
+
−
Does the number of applications I have, or the number of sessions I have affect my pricing with Pendo?
No. Pendo pricing is based on Monthly Active Users (MAUs), not the number of applications you track or the number of sessions a user has. You can use Pendo across multiple applications at no additional cost per application. In fact, adding more applications gives you richer insights and a more complete view of your users.
+
−
Does Pendo offer discounts?
Volume and bundle discounts are already built into our pricing. We can also tailor additional options to your specific business needs. Your Pendo representative can guide you through the best fit.
+
−
Does Pendo offer a free trial?
Yes. We offer a 30-day free trial of the full Pendo platform. Because Pendo is an extensive solution, we recommend starting with the areas most relevant to your goals, then expanding from there.
If you’re already a customer and want to try additional functionality, reach out. We’re happy to set up trial access so you can explore new features when the timing is right for your team.
+
−
How is the Pendo free trial different from Pendo Free, and how do I choose?
Pendo Free is our free-forever version that helps teams get started with improving their software experience. It includes product analytics, in-app guides, Pendo-branded roadmaps, and Pendo-branded NPS surveys, and supports unlimited web and mobile app keys for up to 500 monthly active users (MAUs). It’s a great way to explore core functionality and see the power of Pendo in action.
The 30-day free trial gives you access to the entire platform – analytics, in-app guides, feedback, journey orchestration, and more – so you can experience everything before choosing the plan that fits your needs. If you want the full picture of what Pendo can do, the trial is the best place to start.
+
−
Can I customize a Pendo plan?
Our bundles are designed to deliver the most value by combining capabilities that work best together. That said, we know every business is different and plans can be customized based on your business needs. Talk to a rep for more information.
+
−
What integrations does Pendo support?
Pendo connects with more than 85 tools across CRM, support, marketing automation, collaboration, and analytics platforms. For the complete list, visit the
Pendo integrations page
.
+
−
What happens if I exceed my Pendo plan limits?
If you’re on a paid plan, exceeding your MAU limit won’t disrupt your Pendo experience. Your functionality will continue to run without interruption. Your Pendo account representative will reach out to understand whether the increase is due to expected growth that may require a contract adjustment, or if it’s a configuration issue we can help resolve.
If you’re on Pendo Free, exceeding the MAU limit means you won’t be able to create new guides, NPS surveys, or segments until you upgrade to a paid plan.
No pressure. Just answers.
See how Pendo works for your specific challenges, whether you’re tracking adoption, proving ROI, or measuring AI.

Try Free today ->

analysis.name: Pendo
analysis.tagline: Close the gap between AI spend and AI adoption.
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered product analytics and adoption platform that captures user behavior across software and AI agents, identifies friction, and drives adoption through in-app guidance and predictive intelligence.
analysis.ideal_customer: Product, IT, and revenue teams at B2B SaaS companies managing user adoption, onboarding, and product-led growth at scale

features.name: product analytics
features.description: Track clicks, feature usage, and user behavior across web and mobile apps
features.evidence_quote: Analytics ✓ (included in all plans)

features.name: in-app guides
features.description: Create tooltips, walkthroughs, and onboarding flows delivered in-product without engineering changes
features.evidence_quote: In-app guides ✓ (included in all plans)

features.name: session replay
features.description: Record and replay user sessions to watch experiences through users' eyes
features.evidence_quote: Session replays ✓ Core / Ultimate; $ add-on on Base

features.name: nps surveys
features.description: In-app Net Promoter Score surveys; Pendo-branded on free tier, unbranded on paid
features.evidence_quote: Net Promoter Score (NPS) — Pendo branded on Free tier

features.name: pmf surveys
features.description: Product-market fit surveys to gauge how essential users find the product
features.evidence_quote: Collect and analyze user feedback with built-in surveys in Pendo, such as NPS, PMF, CSAT and UX-Lite.

features.name: csat surveys
features.description: Customer satisfaction surveys delivered in-app
features.evidence_quote: Collect and analyze user feedback with built-in surveys in Pendo, such as NPS, PMF, CSAT and UX-Lite.

features.name: ux-lite surveys
features.description: Standardized UX-Lite survey instrument for measuring perceived usability in-app
features.evidence_quote: Collect and analyze user feedback with built-in surveys in Pendo, such as NPS, PMF, CSAT and UX-Lite.

features.name: sentiment
features.description: Aggregate and analyze user sentiment across survey responses to understand what users care about
features.evidence_quote: Sentiment (NPS, PMF, CSAT surveys) included in Ultimate

features.name: listen
features.description: Continuous user feedback collection to inform product development and roadmap prioritization
features.evidence_quote: Turn user voices into product insights. — included in Ultimate

features.name: orchestrate
features.description: Build cross-channel user journeys combining in-app guides and email sequences
features.evidence_quote: Journey orchestration — included in Ultimate; $ add-on on Base/Core

features.name: data sync
features.description: Sync Pendo behavioral data with external data warehouses and BI tools
features.evidence_quote: Data management & access ✓ all plans; Data Sync included in Ultimate

features.name: predict
features.description: AI-powered churn prediction and upsell opportunity identification with models built in days
features.evidence_quote: Predict churn risks and upsell opportunities. Catch at-risk users before they leave.

features.name: agent analytics
features.description: Measure AI agent adoption, usage, and connect agent interactions to retention and revenue outcomes
features.evidence_quote: Measure how users interact with AI agents and connect those experiences to real outcomes like retention, conversion, and revenue.

features.name: leo ai assistant
features.description: Natural language interface to query Pendo data and get instant product answers without building reports
features.evidence_quote: Ask Pendo questions in natural language and get answers without building reports.

features.name: agent mode
features.description: AI agent that answers complex product questions instantly from a conversational prompt
features.evidence_quote: Get instant answers to your toughest product questions by asking in natural language.

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Model Context Protocol server to query Pendo product data from Claude, Cursor, or any LLM tool
features.evidence_quote: Connect Pendo data to Claude, Cursor, or any AI tool to unlock product context wherever you work.

features.name: retroactive analytics
features.description: Access complete product data history from the day Pendo was installed — no historical data loss
features.evidence_quote: Access your product's complete data history from the day you install Pendo.

features.name: resource center
features.description: In-app self-service widget giving users quick access to guides, articles, and support content
features.evidence_quote: Get easy access to the information you need to work better with Pendo.

features.name: mobile sdk
features.description: Native iOS and Android SDK delivering analytics and guides across mobile apps
features.evidence_quote: Install the Pendo SDK to provide analytics and guides across all of your mobile apps.

features.name: browser extension implementation
features.description: Deploy Pendo Launcher via browser extension for third-party or internal applications without code access
features.evidence_quote: Install and configure Pendo by deploying the Pendo Launcher on your third-party applications.

features.name: javascript snippet implementation
features.description: Direct web instrumentation by inserting a JS code block into the application
features.evidence_quote: Install and configure Pendo by inserting a JavaScript code block directly into your application.

features.name: funnel analysis
features.description: Track multi-step conversion funnels through product features to identify drop-off
features.evidence_quote: Add funnels & paths to a dashboard

features.name: path analysis
features.description: Visualize sequences of steps users take through the product before and after key events
features.evidence_quote: Add funnels & paths to a dashboard

features.name: feature tagging
features.description: Tag and track specific UI elements to measure feature adoption without writing custom event code
features.evidence_quote: Feature tag specific areas of URL

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Configurable analytics dashboards combining funnels, paths, and behavioral metrics
features.evidence_quote: Add funnels & paths to a dashboard

features.name: product engagement score
features.description: Composite metric scoring overall user engagement with the product, reportable at account level
features.evidence_quote: Creating a Report of Accounts by PES

features.name: account analytics
features.description: Account-level behavioral analytics and reporting for B2B multi-seat use cases
features.evidence_quote: Creating a Report of Accounts by PES

features.name: user segmentation
features.description: Segment visitors by behavior, metadata, or account attributes for targeted guides and analysis
features.evidence_quote: Define your application product areas and events, and the people who visit your application.

features.name: multi-app support
features.description: Track multiple applications under one Pendo subscription at no additional per-app cost
features.evidence_quote: You can use Pendo across multiple applications at no additional cost per application.

features.name: oem / white-label
features.description: Manage Pendo analytics and guides for end customers as an OEM partner with sub-subscriptions
features.evidence_quote: Manage Pendo OEM subscriptions, analytics, and guides for end customers.

features.name: roadmaps
features.description: Product roadmap sharing with users; Pendo-branded on free tier
features.evidence_quote: Pendo branded roadmaps — included in Free

features.name: feedback collection
features.description: Collect and manage in-app user feature requests for product planning and roadmap prioritization
features.evidence_quote: Collect user requests.

features.name: validate
features.description: User research and validation tool for testing product concepts with real users
features.evidence_quote: Validate (listed in platform navigation)

features.name: api access
features.description: REST API and developer SDK for programmatic access to Pendo data and configuration
features.evidence_quote: View agent and API documentation, SDK release notes, and more.

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Outbound webhooks to push Pendo events to external systems in real time
features.evidence_quote: Webhooks — Connector integration listed

features.name: churn prediction models
features.description: Pre-built churn prediction models segmented for RevOps, Sales, Marketing, and CS teams
features.evidence_quote: Churn prediction models for RevOps, Sales, Marketing, and CS.

features.name: ai issue detection for agents
features.description: Automatically surface where AI agents fail or underperform based on behavioral signals
features.evidence_quote: Issue detection to automatically surface where agents fail.

features.name: automatic ai insights
features.description: AI proactively finds behavioral patterns and flags product opportunities without manual report setup
features.evidence_quote: AI finds patterns and flags opportunities. Act on proven signals.

features.name: guide targeting and activation
features.description: Target guides to specific user segments and trigger activation via UI elements, conditions, or events
features.evidence_quote: Activating Resource Center by UI element

features.name: custom metadata variables in guides
features.description: Inject custom user or account metadata as dynamic variables within guide content
features.evidence_quote: Is it possible to use Custom Metadata as variables within a guide?

features.name: multi-step poll builder
features.description: Build multi-choice polls with conditional follow-up questions (e.g. 'tell me more' text boxes)
features.evidence_quote: Creating a multi-choice poll with a conditional "tell me more" text box

features.name: cross-origin iframe tagging
features.description: Tag and track elements inside cross-origin iframes for full-page behavioral coverage
features.evidence_quote: Tag elements in cross-origin iframe

features.name: screen resolution tracking
features.description: Capture and analyze user screen resolution as part of behavioral analytics
features.evidence_quote: Can I capture Screen Resolution?

features.name: soc2 type 2 certification
features.description: SOC2 Type 2 certified — third-party audited data security controls
features.evidence_quote: SOC2 Type 2 Certified

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: GDPR-compliant data handling with privacy controls and consent management
features.evidence_quote: GDPR Compliant

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-compliant platform suitable for healthcare customers handling PHI
features.evidence_quote: HIPAA Compliant

features.name: pci dss compliance
features.description: PCI DSS compliant for customers in payment-processing industries
features.evidence_quote: PCI DSS Compliant

features.name: 30-day free trial
features.description: Full-platform 30-day free trial available before committing to a paid plan
features.evidence_quote: We offer a 30-day free trial of the full Pendo platform.

features.name: product discovery
features.description: Tooling to surface and prioritize product opportunities from user data and feedback
features.evidence_quote: Product discovery — $ add-on on Base/Core; included in Ultimate

differentiators: Largest product data set in the world — 35 trillion events across 1B+ users and 50K+ agents & apps
Agent Analytics purpose-built for measuring AI agent adoption and ROI
MCP server enabling Pendo data access from any LLM (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor)
Predict builds AI churn/upsell models in days, not months
Retroactive analytics from day of install — no historical data gap on onboarding
Full module access with no gated features within a purchased plan tier
MAU-based pricing (not seat-based); volume savings built in as usage scales
Multi-app tracking at no additional per-application cost
Covers both product and employee experience (Pendo for IT, Pendo for Employees)

recent_ships.what: Pendomonium 2026 Release — major annual product launch event
recent_ships.source: What's new and next: Pendomonium 2026 Release (landing page)

recent_ships.what: Agent Analytics — measure AI agent adoption and prove ROI; free tier with prompt allowance
recent_ships.source: Landing: 'Track AI, prove ROI.' Pricing: 'Try free today — Free prompt allowance included'

recent_ships.what: MCP server — Pendo data queryable from Claude, Cursor, or any AI tool via MCP protocol
recent_ships.source: Landing: 'Connect Pendo data to Claude, Cursor, or any AI tool'

recent_ships.what: Predict — AI-powered churn and upsell prediction add-on with CRM and BI connectors
recent_ships.source: Landing: 'Predictive AI models built in just days, not months'

recent_ships.what: Leo AI assistant / Agent Mode — natural language product analytics without report-building
recent_ships.source: Pricing: 'Ask. Answer. Act: Ask Pendo questions in natural language'

praised: Empowers product people without engineering: 'I'm empowered to go in and make positive changes for our users on my own, without needing to involve the development team'
Speed of insight: 'We can be faster, we can be more nimble, we can be more innovative because we get the information faster'
Error reduction: 'What used to be a lot of errors happening at once went to effectively zero'
Real-time AI feedback loop: 'We're getting input [from Pendo] directly inside the product, right as users interact with [our] agents'

free_tier.limits: 500 MAUs; Pendo-branded NPS surveys and roadmaps; no session replay; no sentiment upgrades

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Product Analytics, In-app Guides, Pendo-branded NPS + roadmaps; up to 500 MAUs

tiers.name: Base
tiers.headline_inclusions: Product Analytics, In-app Guides; custom MAU volume; Session Replay + others as paid add-ons

tiers.name: Core
tiers.headline_inclusions: Product Analytics, In-app Guides, Session Replay; custom MAU volume; Product Discovery as add-on

tiers.name: Ultimate
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full suite: Analytics, Guides, Session Replay, Sentiment, Orchestrate, Listen, Data Sync, Product Discovery

pricing.notes: MAU-based pricing, not seat-based; cost per MAU decreases at volume. Predict and Agent Analytics are standalone add-ons purchasable on any plan. Agent Analytics has a free prompt allowance. 30-day full-platform free trial available. No per-application fees. Volume and bundle discounts built in.
